analysis_result: 35 DEGs (upregulated in NF-G3 vs Other: logFC > 1 AND FDR < 0.05)
denominator_used: N = 124 rows in the NF-G3 Differentially Expressed Genes block of MOESM6 (columns 14-18)
assumptions_made: Interpreted 'logFC > 1' as strict positive logFC > 1 (genes upregulated in NF-G3 vs Other); used column 'logFCvsOther' (column 16) and 'FDR' (column 18); signed convention: positive logFC means higher mean expression in NF-G3 than in Other (as evidenced by Schwann-cell markers MPZ, PMP2, S100B having positive logFC, consistent with neurofibroma biology); NF-G3 block is present in MOESM6
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM6_ESM.xlsx (Sheet1), 126 rows x 19 columns. Three two-column-plus-metadata DEG blocks are present: MPNST-G1 (cols 0-4), MPNST-G2 (cols 7-11), and NF-G3 (cols 14-18). Each block has columns: Symbol, Clust_*_Mean, logFCvsOther, pVal, FDR.

B. COHORT DEFINITION: NF-G3 block (cols 14-18), starting at row 2 (after two header rows). After dropping rows with NaN Symbol, the block contains 124 gene rows.

C. VARIABLE CODING: logFCvsOther (column 16) converted to numeric; FDR (column 18) converted to numeric. Filter applied: logFCvsOther > 1 AND FDR < 0.05. Positive logFC indicates higher expression in NF-G3 vs Other (confirmed by the presence of known Schwann-cell/neurofibroma markers MPZ, PMP2, S100B, CDH1, GFRA3, ALDH1A1, PMP22, MAL, CD74, CDKN2A with positive logFC).

D. COMPUTATION: Applied boolean mask (logFCvsOther > 1) & (FDR < 0.05) and summed True entries.

E. RESULT: 35 DEGs are upregulated in NF-G3 vs Other (logFC > 1, FDR < 0.05). For reference, 43 DEGs have logFC < -1 AND FDR < 0.05 (downregulated in NF-G3 vs Other), and 78 total DEGs meet |logFC| > 1 AND FDR < 0.05.

F. CAVEATS: The MOESM6 file lists genes for each group (not a full genome-wide DE table) - it likely represents a curated top DEG list. Thus '35' is the count within the provided NF-G3 block meeting the cut-off, not the count across the full transcriptome. The sign convention was verified biologically (Schwann-cell markers have positive logFC in NF-G3 vs MPNST-like groups as expected).
